name: vscode-casecraft
description: Generate comprehensive test suites from feature documents using RAG and Copilot models

chatParticipants.name: casecraft
chatParticipants.description: Generate comprehensive test suites from feature documents using RAG

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate test cases from a feature document

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Ingest documents or URLs into the knowledge base

casecraft.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter used for the CaseCraft backend.

casecraft.projectRoot.description: Path to the CaseCraft project root. Leave empty to auto-detect from the workspace.

enumDescriptions: Use VS Code Copilot models (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini) — no API key needed

casecraft.model.description: Model identifier. For Copilot: 'gpt-4o', 'claude-3.5-sonnet', etc. For Ollama: 'llama3.1:8b', etc.

casecraft.appType.description: Type of application being tested. Affects generated test case categories.

casecraft.semanticDedup.description: Enable semantic deduplication to remove similar test cases.

casecraft.reviewerPass.description: Enable AI reviewer pass for improved test quality (adds latency).

casecraft.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the LLM API (only used with ollama/openai/google providers).
